"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un treſchâ Deenâ natze
Jerobeams un wiſi Laudis pee
Rekabeannu/ ittin ka tas Keh-
nisch runnajs un fazzijs: At-
greeseetees pee man treſchâ
Deenâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch atbilde-
ja teem Laudim bahrgi/ jo wiſch
pamette to Wezzajo Padohmu/
fo tee winnam bij dewutchf.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſch runnaja us teem
pehz to Jauno Padchmu/ fazzi-
dams: Mans Tehws irr juhsu
Juhgu genhtu padarrtis/ bet es
to pahr juhs wehl gruhtaku pa-
darrischu. Mans Tehws irr
juhs ar Pahtagahm pahrmah-
zijs/ bet es pahrmahzischu juhs
ar Skarpijeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninsch ne klaun-
fija tohs Laudis/ jo fcht Nowehr-
jhana bija no ta KUNGA/ ka
wiſch farvu Wahrdn avſtiprina-
tu/ fo tas KUNG S bij run-
najs zaur Akiju to Siloniteri us
Jerobeamu Necbata Dehlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiſs Israels re-
dseja/ ka tas Kehninsch winneem
ne klaufija/ tad atbildeja tee Lau-
dis tam Kehnixam attaz/ un faz-
zija: Kahda Dalliba mums irr
pee Dahwida? mums newaid
Behrnu-Mantas pee Isaja Deh-
la/ Israels/ eij tawds Oshwok-
tos/ tad raugi tu mu us tawa
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nammu Dahwids. Ta gahj
Israels us Mahjahm.
Bet pahr teem Israels
Behrneem/ kas Juhda Pilslab-
tos dsihvoja/ waldija Rekabe-
ams arridsan.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fuhttja tas Kehninsch
Rekabeams Adorami/ kas pah-
to Mantr btja eezelts/ bet wiſe
Israels nomehtaja to ar Akini-
neem/ ka tas nomirre. Bet tas
Kehninsch Rekabeams tahpe-
steigdanees us Ratteem/ ka tas
us Jerusalemi behgtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta atkahpe Israels no
Dahwida Naima/ lihds schodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiſs Israels dsir-
deja/ ka Jerobeams bija pahr-
gahjis/ tad fuhtija tee/ un litke
winnu pee tahs Draudses aizt-
naht/ ka wiſs Israels winnu
par Kehnixu darritu/ ne weens
turrejahs pee Dahwida Naima/
ka ta Zilts Juhda ween.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Rekabeams Jeru-
saleme natze/ tad fapulzeja
wiſch wiſu Namnu Juhda/
un Benjamina Zilti/ ſints un
aſtondefmits tubkſtoſchus iſtaf-
itus Wihrus/ kas us Karvu bi-
ja ismahziti/ ka tas ar Israels
Namnu katrotu/ un to Walst-
bu atkah us Rekabeamu Sala-
mana Dehlu westu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Deewa Wahrdes no-
tikfe us Semajn/ weenu Dee-
wa Wihru/ fazzidams:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Runna us Rekabeamu/
Salamana Dehlu/ to Kehnixu
no Juhda/ un us wiſeem Juhda
"
    }
